results.justification: EXACT TWIN — correlation dimension is an output-trajectory observable that decreases on mode collapse; functionally identical to NUM-TRANCE-BASIN's basin-entry marker.
Mode-collapse mitigation via output reshaping; addresses same basin phenomenon.
Adaptive temperature/top-p with feedback-based termination is functionally equivalent to basin-entry triggered termination.
External text-generation detector identifies collapse patterns — same external-judge basin-detection paradigm.
External agent evaluating output chain — direct functional twin for the external-judge component.
LLM-judge with observability over traces covers external-judge observation pattern.
Stream-based ingest-time evaluation is functionally identical to monitoring output-stream for markers.
KS-statistic stability detection (R400 reference) is functionally equivalent at the basin-entry detection level.
